description: Lock the 2026-06-25 source-check of state_armories to Qin imperial bronze-weapon workshop and arsenal logistics.

checks.reason: The corrected node is anchored to the First Emperor mausoleum project and Qin weapon-production logistics, not the old -500 placeholder.
The state armory scope supplies organized military formations rather than generic domestic weapon storage.
The source-pinned evidence is a Qin bronze-weapon assemblage.
Qin weapon markings and inscriptions support tracking, quality control, and production accountability.
Chain-mail armor is excluded from the corrected Qin bronze-weapon workshop and arsenal scope.
The -500 military signal flags node must not depend on the corrected -246 Qin armory scope.
